name: specnaut
description: Spec-driven workflow, slash commands, and sub-agents for AI coding harnesses — Specnaut's bundled skill library, agents, and the SessionStart bootstrap that makes the agent skill-aware on every turn.

interface.shortDescription: Spec-driven planning, TDD, review, and delivery workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Specnaut turns vague ideas into shipped features through a disciplined pipeline: brainstorming → writing-plans → subagent-driven-development (or executing-plans inline) → requesting-code-review → verification-before-completion. The bundled router skill (/specnaut) orchestrates the spec-kit greenfield flow (specify → plan → tasks → analyze → implement → review → merge) and 11 specialised sub-agents handle backlog ops, security, QA, DevOps, and more. Inspired by obra/superpowers (MIT) with explicit Specnaut-native integration with backlogs (GitHub/GitLab/local), constitutional governance, and a Claude/Cursor/Codex/Gemini/OpenCode/Copilot multi-harness distribution.
defaultPrompt: Plan how to implement this issue: <paste GitHub issue URL>
Review the changes I just made.
